title: piptatherum laterale subsp. alpestre
intro: Piptatherum laterale subsp. alpestre, also known as alpine needle grass, is a species of grass native to the mountainous regions of Eastern Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of alpine needle grass include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against infections. Alpine needle grass can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
